mnemonics: Divide Problems, Conquer Exams, Combine for Success (DPCES) - for Divide and Conquer strategy.
keyPoints: Understand the Master Theorem for analyzing recurrence relations.
Be able to trace and explain the steps of major algorithms like Quicksort, Merge Sort, and Strassen's Matrix Multiplication.
Differentiate between Greedy and Dynamic Programming approaches to problem-solving.
commonMistakes: Confusing the time complexity of Quicksort's worst-case (O(n²)) with its average-case (O(n log n)).
Incorrectly applying the Master Theorem case for a given recurrence relation.
Failing to properly justify why a greedy choice is safe and optimal for a specific problem.
